title: Maney | Gordon | Zeller, P.A. ransomware incident

extortion.description: As a full-service law firm, Maney, Gordon Zeller, P.A. is proud to provide high-quality legal service to those navigating the U.S. immigration system. We have several offices conveniently located across the country from Pennsylvania to Florida. This way, we are always available to help our clients get the effective representation that they truly deserve—no matter where they are located geographically. With over a century of combined experience, we are able to provide outstanding representation to clients in a wide-range of immigration matters.SITE: https://www.maneygordon.com
